name: Damora Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Damora Therapeutics is a biopharmaceutical company developing therapies for hematologic disorders, specifically myeloproliferative neoplasms (MPNs). Its lead product candidate, DMR-001, is a monoclonal antibody targeting mutant forms of the calcium binding protein CALR (mutCALR) for the treatment of essential thrombocythemia (ET) and myelofibrosis (MF). The company also has option rights to develop DMR-002 and DMR-003, additional mutCALR-targeting candidates.
sellsTo: United States market for mutCALR driven ET and MF

exposures.sentence: We are a biopharmaceutical company developing therapies for the treatment of hematologic disorders.

catalysts.event: IND or CTA filing for DMR-001
catalysts.sentence: We intend to submit an IND or CTA for DMR-001 and DMR-002 in mid-2026 and the second half of 2026, respectively, and for DMR-003 in 2027.

catalysts.event: IND or CTA filing for DMR-002
catalysts.sentence: We intend to submit an IND or CTA for DMR-001 and DMR-002 in mid-2026 and the second half of 2026, respectively, and for DMR-003 in 2027.

catalysts.event: IND or CTA filing for DMR-003
catalysts.sentence: We intend to submit an IND or CTA for DMR-001 and DMR-002 in mid-2026 and the second half of 2026, respectively, and for DMR-003 in 2027.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 trial for DMR-001
catalysts.sentence: We intend to file an IND or CTA for DMR-001 in mid-2026 and initiate a Phase 1 trial in ET and MF patients with a subcutaneous formulation thereafter, subject to regulatory approval, with two proof-of-concept readouts expected beginning mid-2027.

tamClaims.claim: At least a $5 billion addressable market in the United States for mutCALR driven ET and MF.
tamClaims.sentence: We believe there exists at least a $5 billion addressable market in the United States for mutCALR driven ET and MF.
